headline: Turn The VST Shares You Own Into A 16% Income Stream
summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Vistra shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for capping your gains above a higher price.

headline: Trump Is Expanding a Pledge That Could Stop AI Data Centers From Hiking Your Electricity Bill— Here's Who Just Signed On
summary: White House expands AI data center ratepayer protection pledge, adding utilities and governors to help shield consumers from higher electricity costs.
